one_line_description: AI meeting transcription and notetaking service that records, transcribes, and summarizes meetings.
auth_summary: Otter has no public REST API or API keys. Its official hosted MCP server (https://mcp.otter.ai/mcp) authenticates MCP clients via an OAuth flow tied to the user's Otter account.
access_notes: No developer API credentials exist. The official MCP server is reported as gated to Otter Business/Enterprise plans and may require workspace admin provisioning; community MCPs resort to email/password scraping of the private API.
api_surface_summary: No public REST API is documented. The official MCP exposes meeting-library capabilities (search transcripts, analyze across meetings, surface insights) but only through MCP-compatible AI clients, not a general API.
main_blocker: No public API or API keys; the only vendor-sanctioned programmatic surface is the hosted OAuth MCP server (plan-gated), and community alternatives rely on unofficial credential-based scraping.
agent_notes: The 'reportedly has an MCP server' claim VERIFIED: Otter ships an official remote MCP at mcp.otter.ai/mcp with OAuth. However there is no public API for building a classic toolkit; help center states no public API key is available. Based on official help-center/blog pages seen in search results, not fully fetched.
